primary_target.justification: No window overlap at 3 month lead.

secondary_target.justification: Included for comparison, obviously has 3 months of overlap so needs to be included in analysis.

sam.justification: Coherent negative correlation with WHDI3 peaking at lag 2, drives both wind and runoff in DJF/MAM. Sign reversal in JJA requires seasonal context.

oni.justification: Strong runoff signal in JJA (r=0.38) and SON (r=0.34) at lag 0. Wind signal only in MAM at lag 2. Lag 0-1 provides current state context.

iod.role: Long range hydro predictor via ENSO pathway
iod.justification: Strongest single teleconnection: IOD runoff in JJA (r=-0.40) at lag 3. Also significant at lags 8-11 as ENSO early warning.

season.justification: SAM reverses sign between DJF and JJA. IOD only active in JJA. ONI strongest in SON. Without seasonal context, opposing signals cancel.

local_condition.role: Group B features for local only baseline comparison
local_condition.justification: Tests whether climate modes add skill beyond knowing current local conditions.

notes.sam_trend: SAM trending positive there is potential non stationarity in teleconnection. Monitor walk forward CV for degrading skill.
notes.iod_retention: IOD retained despite long lags. Signal is physically explainable through IOD ENSO interaction and concentrated in runoff component as expected.
notes.oni_wind: ONI shows weak wind signal in MAM only. Not a compound driver but may contribute to seasonal model skill.
